name: Machine Economic Life Calculator
description: Determines the optimal economic life of a machine by balancing capital costs, operating costs, and productivity losses, aligned with ISO 15663, Lean, and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: Initial capital investment for the machine, including installation and commissioning.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial capital investment for the machine, including installation and commissioning.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurulum ve devreye alma dahil makine için ilk sermaye yatırımı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anfängliche Kapitalinvestition für die Maschine, einschließlich Installation und Inbetriebnahme.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Investissement initial en capital pour la machine, incluant l'installation et la mise en service.
businessContext_i18n.es: Inversión de capital inicial para la máquina, incluyendo instalación y puesta en marcha.

inputs.label: Salvage Value at End of Life
inputs.businessContext: Estimated resale or scrap value at the end of the machine's useful life.

label_i18n.en: Salvage Value at End of Life
label_i18n.fr: Valeur de récupération en fin de vie
label_i18n.es: Valor residual al final de la vida útil

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated resale or scrap value at the end of the machine's useful life.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Makinenin faydalı ömrünün sonunda tahmini yeniden satış veya hurda değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Wiederverkaufs- oder Schrottwert am Ende der Nutzungsdauer der Maschine.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur de revente ou de rebut estimée à la fin de la durée de vie utile de la machine.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor estimado de reventa o desecho al final de la vida útil de la máquina.

inputs.label: Estimated Useful Life
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of years the machine will be operational before major overhaul or replacement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected number of years the machine will be operational before major overhaul or replacement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Makinenin büyük bir revizyon veya değiştirme öncesinde çalışır durumda olması beklenen yıl sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Anzahl von Jahren, in denen die Maschine vor einer Generalüberholung oder einem Austausch betriebsbereit ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années prévu pendant lequel la machine sera opérationnelle avant une révision majeure ou un remplacement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número esperado de años que la máquina estará operativa antes de una revisión mayor o reemplazo.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Cost (Year 1)
inputs.businessContext: Includes energy, consumables, labor, and routine maintenance in the first year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Includes energy, consumables, labor, and routine maintenance in the first year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk yıldaki enerji, sarf malzemeleri, işçilik ve rutin bakımı içerir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umfasst Energie, Verbrauchsmaterialien, Arbeitskräfte und routinemäßige Wartung im ersten Jahr.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Inclut l'énergie, les consommables, la main-d'œuvre et la maintenance de routine la première année.
businessContext_i18n.es: Incluye energía, consumibles, mano de obra y mantenimiento rutinario en el primer año.

inputs.label: Operating Cost Escalation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual increase in operating costs due to aging, inflation, and wear.

label_i18n.es: Tasa de escalamiento del costo operativo

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual increase in operating costs due to aging, inflation, and wear.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eskime, enflasyon ve aşınma nedeniyle işletme maliyetlerindeki yıllık artış.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Anstieg der Betriebskosten aufgrund von Alterung, Inflation und Verschleiß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Augmentation annuelle des coûts d'exploitation due au vieillissement, à l'inflation et à l'usure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Incremento anual en los costos operativos debido al envejecimiento, inflación y desgaste.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital used for net present value calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital used for net present value calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Net bugünkü değer hesaplamaları için kullanılan ağırlıklı ortalama sermaye maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewichteter durchschnittlicher Kapitalkostensatz, der für die Nettobarwertberechnung verwendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen pondéré du capital utilisé pour les calculs de valeur actuelle nette.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio ponderado del capital utilizado para cálculos de valor presente neto.

inputs.label: Annual Production Units
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced per year at full capacity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units produced per year at full capacity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam kapasitede yılda üretilen birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der pro Jahr bei voller Auslastung produzierten Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités produites par an à pleine capacité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de unidades producidas por año a plena capacidad.

inputs.label: Revenue per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Selling price per unit produced by the machine.

businessContext_i18n.en: Selling price per unit produced by the machine.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Makine tarafından üretilen birim başına satış fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verkaufspreis pro von der Maschine produzierter Einheit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix de vente unitaire produit par la machine.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de venta por unidad producida por la máquina.

rules.message: Salvage value must be less than purchase price.
Useful life must be greater than zero.
Projected defect rate exceeds 100% within useful life.
Utilization rate must be between 0 and 100.

thresholds.message: Annual operating cost exceeds 30% of purchase price; consider replacement.
Utilization rate below 60%; investigate root causes.
Initial defect rate above 5%; Six Sigma DMAIC recommended.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
